summary: Completed E2E verification of EPIC0 (IA Hygiene/nav cleanup) and EPIC1 (Role Experience / per-role Home landing + tightened sales access) for Kain Nusantara (KN11) WMS/ERP/POS. Backend APIs and frontend UI/integration tested successfully.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 instead of 403 for sales role
minor_issues.impact: Low - endpoint still blocks sales access, just with 404 instead of 403. Endpoint may not be implemented yet.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 404 instead of 403 for sales role
minor_issues.impact: Low - endpoint still blocks sales access, just with 404 instead of 403. Endpoint may not be implemented yet.

minor_observations.issue: POS and Pesanan Penjualan nav items not immediately visible in sidebar
minor_observations.note: Items may be under collapsed groups or named differently. Sales can still access these features via 'Buat Order' button on home page.

passed_tests: AUTH: Login successful for all 4 roles (admin, manager, sales, warehouse)
EPIC1: Admin home (Control Tower) accessible by admin & manager, 403 for sales
EPIC1: Sales home (Performa Saya) accessible by all authenticated users
EPIC1: Manager home accessible by admin & manager
EPIC1: Admin lands on Control Tower with real KPIs (Penjualan Hari Ini, MTD, AR Outstanding, etc.)
EPIC1: Sales lands on Performa Saya with personal KPIs (Komisi MTD, Capaian Target, Penjualan MTD, etc.)
EPIC1: Manager lands on Dashboard & Analytics (reports view)
EPIC1: Warehouse lands on Operasi Gudang (WMS operations view)
EPIC1: Sales RBAC - Sales cannot access vendor-bills (403), purchase-requisitions (403), purchase-orders (403)
EPIC1: Sales RBAC - Admin can access vendor-bills (200), purchase-orders (200)
EPIC1: Sales sidebar does NOT show back-office items (Tagihan Supplier, Landed Cost, Faktur Pajak Masukan, Purchase Requisition, Pesanan Pembelian)
EPIC0: Admin sidebar has 'SEGERA HADIR' (Coming Soon) group
EPIC0: 'SEGERA HADIR' group is collapsed by default (aria-expanded=false)
EPIC0: Main navigation groups present (Penjualan, Pembelian, Gudang, Analitik)
EPIC0: Breadcrumb shows correctly - Admin: 'BERANDA › EKSEKUTIF', Sales: 'BERANDA › PENJUALAN', Manager: 'BERANDA › ANALITIK'
Regression: WMS/Operations page loads without errors
Regression: Pages have content (not white screen)
